intent: Wide-shell 2BR / 1 bath SINGLE BATH with mid-band HALL and combined GREAT ROOM — 14x10 m lot, NO CARPORT. Envelope 10x6 = 60 m² floor. Bedrooms stack front-to-rear on the left (master front, hall middle, standard rear). Single common bath at rear-middle. Great room + kitchen on the right column (gr style, open LDK). Hall threads between master south and common bath south, with bedroom doors to both bedrooms and a bath door to common; hall opens east into the great_room.
must_haves: single common bath publicly accessible from hall
hall serves both bedrooms and the bath as the bedroom-wing circulation node
wet-stack between common bath and kitchen
